case_title: ERNESTO ENRIQUE HELWING VS. ALEXANDER H. LUBARSKY LLM DBA COMMUNITY LEGAL

docket_entries.description: EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED AUG-01-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF HELWING, ERNESTO ENRIQUE ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HELWING, ERNESTO ENRIQUE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALEXANDER H. LUBARSKY LLM DBA COMMUNITY LEGAL CENTER $7,500.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,500.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED NO EXHIBITS FILED

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY HELWING, ERNESTO ENRIQUE AS TO DEFENDANT ALEXANDER H. LUBARSKY LLM DBA COMMUNITY LEGAL CENTER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-04-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR AN INTERPRETER. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-04-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO FEB-06-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ERNESTO ENRIQUE HELWING. DEFENDANT ALEXANDER H. LUBARSKY LLM DBA COMMUNITY LEGAL DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-27-2019 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HELWING, ERNESTO ENRIQUE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ALEXANDER H. LUBARSKY LLM DBA COMMUNITY LEGAL CENTER STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-06-2019 - CONTINUED FOR INTERPRETER TO MAR-27-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ERNESTO ENQUIRE. DEFENDANT DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING CALENDAR OF MAR. 27, 2019. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY, PLACED UNDER OATH AND TESTIFIED. AFTER HEARING THE EVIDENCE PRESENTED, THE COURT TAKES THIS MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION. NO EXHIBIT RETAINED BY THE COURT. JUDGE JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK S. RAVINANTAPRICHA. NOT REPORTED.
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT ALEXANDER H. LUBARSKY LLM DBA COMMUNITY LEGAL CENTER HEARING SET FOR MAY-01-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER MOTION TO VACATE IS GRANTED AND CASE CONTINUED. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY IS GRANTED. CONTINUED TO MAY-15-2019 AT 8:30 AM IN 506 FOR TRIAL. PLAINTIFF ERNESTO ENRIQUE HELWING IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY CERTIFIED COURT SPANISH INTERPRETER JEAN GARASCIA. DEFENDANT ALEXANDER LUBARSKY DBA COMMUNITY LEGAL IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $0.00- SERVED JAN-15-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ALEXANDER H. LUBARSKY LLM DBA COMMUNITY LEGAL CENTER

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-15-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-15-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF ERNESTO ENRIQUE HELWING IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED JEAN GARASCIA. DEFENDANT ALEXANDER H. LUBARSKY LLM DBA COMMUHITY LEGAL IS PRESENT. HONORABLE A JAMES ROBERTSON FINDS ARBITRATION CLAUSE IN THIS ATTORNEY/CLIENT CONTRACT IS NOT BINDING BECAUSE THE PLAINTIFF DID NOT UNDERSTAND THE CONTRACT HE SIGNED AND THEREFORE WILL HEAR THE CASE. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
